operators.name: City of Coeur d'Alene Water Department
notes: City Water Department page identifies the Rathdrum Prairie aquifer as the present sole source of water.
2012 water plan identifies the City-operated public water system as PWS ID1280053.

City Water Department page states the system has 11 wells, more than 42 million gallons per day pump capacity, approximately 6 million gallons of storage, over 20,000 active accounts, and 26 full-time employees.
Idaho DEQ public water system list identifies COEUR D ALENE CITY OF as a community system serving 54,115 people with 20,174 connections.
